name: Take That Bum With Ya
title: Take That Bum With Ya
text: The opposing team's manager gets drunk after the game and slurs, 'yyy'you can take that bum with ya.' He's pointing at one of his better players.
flavor: A warm bottle, a bad loss, and a very loose tongue.

choices.label: Take the player
choices.effectText: Claim one opposing player (+7 tier) if you have roster room.

name: Straight Swap
title: Straight Swap
text: The opposing manager offers you a trade: his (+6) for your (+5) and a (+3 or higher). Take it or leave it. You may draw one Free Agent Card as a sweetener.
flavor: Every trade feels fair until the season's over.

choices.label: Make the deal
choices.effectText: Trade your (+5) and (+3) for opponent's (+6). Draw 1 Free Agent Card.

name: Wants Out
title: Wants Out
text: A member of the other team, a (+5), sidles up to you after the game. 'Got any space for me, coach? I can't take another day with that lunatic.'
flavor: Some guys just need a change of scenery. Or a change of manager.

choices.label: Welcome aboard
choices.effectText: Sign the (+5). Must release a player of the same position.

name: Loose Cannon
title: Loose Cannon
text: A (+6) from the other team just got in a drunken brawl with their own (+3). He's talented, he's volatile, and he's available. The question is: can you handle him?
flavor: Talent and trouble ride the same train.

choices.label: Sign the loose cannon
choices.effectText: Add (+6) to roster. +2 Intensity, +1 Scandal. Risk of future clubhouse event.

name: The Big Fish
title: The Big Fish
text: The other team is willing to deal their (+7) to you, but they want your (+6) and a (+4). 'Wanna gamble?' Draw one Free Agent Card.
flavor: The best trades always sting a little.

choices.label: Make the deal
choices.effectText: Trade your (+6) and (+4) for their (+7). Draw 1 Free Agent.

name: Highway Robbery
title: Highway Robbery
text: Is this guy dreaming? The opposing team is offering their (+8) for your (+5), (+5), and (+4). But wait a minute here. Draw two Free Agent Cards.
flavor: When the deal sounds too good, it usually is. But sometimes it ain't.

choices.label: Take the deal
choices.effectText: Trade three players for their (+8). Draw 2 Free Agents.

name: Victory Spoils
title: Victory Spoils
text: Win: 'Aw to hell with ya, I'll swap my (+5) for your (+4), get outta town!' Lose: 'Jeez kid, take the (+4), you need him more than I do.'
flavor: The post-game handshake that turns into a transaction.

name: Fury Swap
title: Fury Swap
text: Win: 'You sonofabitch, here just take (+6) and get the fuck outta here!' Lose: 'Thems the breaks, punk. Here take (+5), I ain't got space for him.'
flavor: Baseball trades are 30% strategy and 70% emotion.

name: Broadway Exit
title: Broadway Exit
text: Win: The opposing (+4) was wondering if you had a spot for him. Lose: One of your better players (+5) decided to quit the team and go sing on Broadway.
flavor: Eternity makes dreamers of us all.

name: Existential Crisis Trade
title: Existential Crisis Trade
text: Win: 'I'm so sick of this game. I hate eternity!' The other manager unloads his (+9) for your (+6), (+5), and (+4). Draw 2 Free Agent Cards. Lose: Nothing. Hit the showers.
flavor: Even infinity gets old.

choices.label: Take the deal (Win only)
choices.effectText: Trade three players for (+9). Draw 2 Free Agents.

name: Even Trade Keeper
title: Even Trade — Opponent
text: KEEPER: Hold this card. Play it at any time to initiate an even-value trade with the opposing team. You pick, they accept. That's how keepers work around here.
flavor: The ace up your sleeve. Use it wisely.

name: Full Deck Trade Keeper
title: Even Trade — Full Deck
text: KEEPER: Hold this card. Play it at any time to initiate an even-value trade with any player in the entire available pool. The whole deck is your catalog.
flavor: In eternity, everyone's available. Eventually.

name: Pulled Something
title: Pulled Something
text: Your (+5) stretches something unpronounceable during the game. Trainer says he's out next game, maybe longer if he doesn't rest.
flavor: They don't even know what to call the muscle he pulled.

name: Hot Streak / Hangover
title: Hot Streak / Hangover
text: Win: Your (+4) gets an extra Contact point next game — he's seeing the ball like a grapefruit. Lose: Your (+5) stays out late getting hammered. He's useless tomorrow. Out 1 game.
flavor: The night after a win and the night after a loss are very different animals.

name: Ty Cobb Heckles
title: Ty Cobb Heckles
text: Ty Cobb shows up at batting practice and starts heckling your whole squad. But your (+6) hit one out right as he told Cobb to go to hell. That (+6) hits one guaranteed bomb tonight.
flavor: The Georgia Peach never could keep his mouth shut. Sometimes that works in your favor.

name: Babe Ruth's Party
title: Babe Ruth's Party
text: Babe Ruth was up late partying with several of your players. One of them woke up in a bathtub of gin. Your (+5) is out tonight.
flavor: The Sultan of Swat is also the Sultan of Bad Decisions.

name: Old Friend
title: Old Friend
text: One of your teammates was lifelong friends with a legend. They reconnect over dinner. Choose a (+6) card of your choice from the available pool and add him to your roster.
flavor: In eternity, old friends always turn up.

choices.label: Sign the old friend
choices.effectText: Choose any (+6) from the available pool.

name: Drunken Signing
title: Drunken Signing
text: As it turns out, you signed a (+7) when you were out drinking last night. You almost forgot. Choose a (+7) card of your choice.
flavor: The best contracts are written on cocktail napkins.

name: Tape Study
title: Tape Study
text: You sign a (+8) after watching his little league tapes. Something about the swing. Choose a (+8). You must discard your (+6) or highest card to make room.
flavor: Scouts see the future. Good managers trust the film.

choices.label: Sign the (+8)
choices.effectText: Choose any (+8). Discard your (+6) or highest card.

name: Fed Up
title: Fed Up
text: Your (+6) says he's sick of the way you've been using him and chooses to walk. Don't bother chasing him. Draw 1 Free Agent Card as a replacement.
flavor: You can't make everyone happy. Especially not for eternity.

name: Stirring Speech
title: Stirring Speech
text: After the game you give a stirring speech that would make Knute Rockne weep. Next game, your starting pitcher is rated (5) regardless of actual rating.
flavor: Words win ball games. Sometimes.

name: Ted Williams Tips
title: Ted Williams Tips
text: Ted Williams drops by to give your guys some batting tips. But all it does is get in their heads and mess them up. You spend the afternoon fixing things in BP. No effect.
flavor: The greatest hitter who ever lived is also the worst hitting coach in eternity.

name: Charlie Hough Emergency Start
title: Charlie Hough Emergency Start
text: Legendary knuckleballer Charlie Hough says he'll pitch for you tomorrow. Win last game: he's a (5). Lost last game: he's a (4). Either way, that knuckleball dances.
flavor: The ball floats up there like a butterfly with a grudge.

choices.label: Let Hough pitch
choices.effectText: Hough starts next game. Rating depends on last result.

name: Post-Game Brawl
title: Post-Game Brawl
text: Win: After the game, one of your guys punches the other team's (+6)! They make up and he agrees to join. Lose: After the game, one of your guys gets his ass kicked. -1 morale.
flavor: The handshake line got interesting.

name: Newspaper Quote
title: Newspaper Quote
text: Win: You're quoted in the local newspaper. A young (+8) hears it and is inspired to join. Sign (+8) of your choosing. Lose: You talk shit to reporters. Nothing much comes of it.
flavor: The pen is mightier than the bat. But only on good days.

name: Pete Rose at the Signing Table
title: Pete Rose at the Signing Table
text: You meet Pete Rose at an autograph signing. He offers to play for next to nothing. But you gotta replace your 2B — Pete plays where Pete wants.
flavor: Charlie Hustle doesn't care about the money. He cares about the action.

choices.label: Sign Pete Rose
choices.effectText: Release current 2B. Pete Rose joins as 2B.

name: Ozzie Smith Wants In
title: Ozzie Smith Wants In
text: Ozzie Smith thinks your lineup and his glove are a good fit. He'll sign if he starts at SS. No negotiations.
flavor: The Wizard does backflips. Your defense does too.

choices.label: Start Ozzie at SS
choices.effectText: Ozzie Smith joins. Must start at SS.

name: Barry Bonds Prestige
title: Barry Bonds Prestige
text: Barry Bonds is a free agent but will only sign with a team with an overall rating over 90. Is your squad elite enough for the most dangerous hitter in history?
flavor: Barry doesn't join losers. Barry IS the winning.

name: Hack Wilson's Bender
title: Hack Wilson's Bender
text: Hack Wilson got drunk and punched out his now-former manager. He'll sign, so long as your team's got a chance. Team overall 70 or higher.
flavor: 56 home runs. 191 RBI. And a BAC that could strip paint.

name: Andre Dawson Bargain
title: Andre Dawson Bargain
text: Andre Dawson is being frozen out by greedy colluding owners. He doesn't care what you pay him. He just wants to hit 40 homers a year. Sign him. No conditions.
flavor: Sometimes the best deals cost nothing. The Hawk flies free.

choices.label: Sign Andre Dawson
choices.effectText: Dawson joins your roster. No cost.

name: Sandy Koufax Appears
title: Sandy Koufax Appears
text: Win: 'That was amazing — you seemed overmatched but you've got a good team. Need an arm?' Sign Sandy Koufax. Lose: Tough loss, better luck next time, kid.
flavor: The left arm of God only shows up when you deserve it.

name: Sick of the Bench
title: Sick of the Bench
text: Your (+4) is sick of riding pine behind better players and wants a trade. Luckily the opposing team is sick of their (+5). Even swap. Done deal.
flavor: Two problems solving each other.

name: Big Ed's Temper
title: Big Ed's Temper
text: Big Ed Delahanty takes umbrage with something said post-game. He beat your (+4) near to death. Your player is out for 2 games.
flavor: Ed Delahanty: .346 lifetime average, zero lifetime chill.

name: Clubhouse Feud
title: Clubhouse Feud
text: Your (+6) and another (+6) are at each other's throats again. You have to trade one of them. Maury Wills and Wildfire Schulte are available, or trade for any (+5).
flavor: Two egos, one clubhouse, zero patience.

choices.label: Trade the first (+6)
choices.effectText: Release first (+6). Sign Maury Wills, Wildfire Schulte, or any (+5).

name: Ultimatum
title: Ultimatum
text: Your (+7) comes to you after the game. 'It's him or (+6).' Trade either for a (+5 or less), OR trade BOTH for a (+8). Your call, skip.
flavor: The best players make the worst ultimatums.

name: Beer Brawl
title: Beer Brawl
text: A beer brawl erupts in the locker room. It was your (+5) and (+5) going at it again. Release one or both. Draw a Free Agent Card for each player released.
flavor: Domestic beer, domestic violence.

name: Spiked
title: Spiked
text: Your (+5) got spiked bad on a play at second. He's out for 7 games. You might as well trade or release him.
flavor: Metal cleats and bad intentions.

choices.label: Hold and wait
choices.effectText: Player out 7 games. Roster spot occupied.

choices.label: Release him
choices.effectText: Free the roster spot. Draw 1 Free Agent.

name: Double Play Collision
title: Double Play Collision
text: Your second baseman got taken out on a hard slide turning a double play. He's going to miss the next game.
flavor: The pivot man pays the price.

name: Hit By Pitch
title: Hit By Pitch
text: Your third baseman was hit by a pitch and injured. He's going to miss the next 2 games.
flavor: Inside corner, meet outside forearm.

name: Knee Trouble
title: Knee Trouble
text: Your first baseman is having knee trouble and will miss the next game. Unless next game is a championship — then he plays through it but is out for 2 games after.
flavor: The knee knows what's at stake.

name: Doctoring the Ball
title: Doctoring the Ball
text: After the game it's discovered your starting pitcher had been cheating and doctoring the ball. He's suspended for 3 games!
flavor: Pine tar, Vaseline, and a terrible poker face.

name: Catcher Ejected
title: Catcher Ejected
text: Your catcher had some choice words for the umpire. He got suspended for 2 games! You must trade for a backup catcher at +1 value above your current.
flavor: You can say a lot of things to an umpire. He said all of them.

name: Willie Mays Missed Train
title: Willie Mays Missed Train
text: Willie Mays missed the train to his next game and agreed to play with you tonight to stay sharp. One-game rental. Mays plays as a (+11) for one game only.
flavor: The Say Hey Kid says hey, can I borrow your jersey?

name: Momentum Swing
title: Momentum Swing
text: Win: You're finally stacking up some wins. The team is starting to get behind you! +2 morale. Lose: The team is losing faith in you as manager. Your (+5) walks off. Draw 1 Free Agent.
flavor: Winning cures everything. Losing poisons everything.

name: Trade Demand
title: Trade Demand
text: Win: Great win! Hit the showers! Lose: Tensions are high. You need to make a move just to make a move. Trade any (+5 or up) for a (+4). Sometimes you gotta shake things up.
flavor: Desperation trades are still trades.

name: Negro League Barnstorm
title: Negro League Barnstorm
text: The Negro League team is out barnstorming and they just challenged you! Win: Sign any Negro Leaguer (+8 or lower). Lose: Your (+7 or higher pre-1950) player quits in shame.
flavor: They played a different game. They played it better.

choices.label: Accept the challenge
choices.effectText: Play the barnstorm game. Win/Lose determines outcome.

name: Talk Him Off the Ledge
title: Talk Him Off the Ledge
text: KEEPER: Hold this card. Play it at any time to prevent a player from quitting the team or demanding a trade. Sometimes all they need is a conversation.
flavor: The best managers know when to manage people, not lineups.

name: Shrewd Negotiator
title: Shrewd Negotiator
text: KEEPER: Hold this card. Play it to add (+1) to the receiving end of your next trade. The art of the deal. The baseball deal, anyway.
flavor: Every GM wishes they had this in their pocket.

name: World War
title: World War
text: World War breaks out! All cards rated (+7) and up are drafted into military service and will miss the next 3 games. The roster thins. The stakes rise.
flavor: Even in eternity, history has a way of repeating itself.

name: Terminal Diagnosis
title: Terminal Diagnosis
text: Your highest-rated player comes to you and reveals he has a terminal illness. He'll play 3 final games — 4 if the last one is a championship. Then he's gone forever. Make them count.
flavor: Some stories don't have happy endings. They have meaningful ones.

name: Murder at the Hotel
title: Murder at the Hotel
text: At bed checks, your (+7 or highest) was discovered dead in his hotel room. He'd been writing checks his ass couldn't cash. Discard player permanently.
flavor: Eternity doesn't mean you can't die twice.

name: The Scandal
title: The Scandal
text: Your (+7 or highest) has gotten your daughter pregnant. Choice: discard him permanently, OR he's locked at his position for the rest of the game — can't be traded, can't be benched. He's family now.
flavor: Baseball is a family game. This just got personal.

choices.label: Welcome to the family
choices.effectText: Player locked at position for remainder of game. Cannot trade or bench.

name: Drunk Trade
title: Drunk Trade
text: The opposing manager gets you drunk and you agree to an awful trade. Your (+7 or highest) for his (+4) and (+3). You may need to check out an AA meeting.
flavor: Two drinks became four. Four became a catastrophe.

name: Mickey Mantle or Mass Exodus
title: Mickey Mantle or Mass Exodus
text: If winning record: A player reaches out to Mickey Mantle. He agrees to join. Sign Mickey Mantle. If losing record: All players (+8 and up) leave the team!
flavor: Fortune favors the bold. Misfortune favors the rest.

name: Blackmail
title: Blackmail
text: A sports reporter catches your (+8 or highest) cheating on his wife. He'll stay silent if you sign his friend, a (+3), for at least 5 games. Refuse and your star is out 3 games from the scandal.
flavor: The press always gets their story. One way or another.

choices.label: Sign the reporter's friend
choices.effectText: Sign a (+3) who must stay on roster 5 games. Star plays.

name: Divorce Drama
title: Divorce Drama
text: Your top two players' children are getting divorced from each other. Family tensions mean one of them must be traded for equal value from the next opponent. The traded player will hit a guaranteed homer against you.
flavor: When families break up, clubhouses do too.

choices.label: Trade the first player
choices.effectText: Trade player 1 for equal value. He hits a guaranteed HR against you.

choices.label: Trade the second player
choices.effectText: Trade player 2 for equal value. He hits a guaranteed HR against you.

name: Bathroom Encounter
title: Bathroom Encounter
text: You run into Kirby Puckett in the bathroom at a steakhouse. After a few cordial minutes, he's agreed to replace your (+5) on the team. Puck's in.
flavor: The best signings happen in the strangest places.

name: The Best Game / Worst Day
title: The Best Game / Worst Day
text: Win by 7+: Lou Gehrig asks to join your team. Sign Lou Gehrig. Win by 6 or less: Cal Ripken asks instead. Sign Cal Ripken. Lose: Your (+5) packs his bags, muttering about you sucking eggs.
flavor: The margin of victory determines the magnitude of the miracle.

name: Dazzy Vance Contract
title: Dazzy Vance Contract
text: Dazzy Vance will sign — but only if he's guaranteed starting pitcher for the next 10 games. If you bench or replace him before 10 games, he's released immediately. Non-negotiable.
flavor: The Dazzler has terms. Accept them or move along.

choices.label: Accept Dazzy's terms
choices.effectText: Vance starts SP for 10 games. If benched early, he leaves.

name: Frank Robinson MVP
title: Frank Robinson MVP
text: Frank Robinson was an MVP in both leagues and hopes to be in ILB as well. He'll join your team if you release the outfielder with the least power.
flavor: The only man to win MVP in both leagues wants to add a third.

choices.label: Sign Frank Robinson
choices.effectText: Release your OF with lowest POW. Robinson joins.

name: Busted Hand
title: Busted Hand
text: Your (+6) busted his hand up on a slide. He'll miss your next game. Ice, tape, and bourbon.
flavor: The dirt at second base doesn't forgive.

name: Mental Asylum
title: Mental Asylum
text: Your (+7 pre-1950) went to a quack doctor for treatment and ended up committed to a mental asylum. He's gone for the rest of the season. This is not a joke. This happened.
flavor: Baseball history is full of horrors that aren't in the record books.

name: Rain Delay Keeper
title: Rain Delay
text: KEEPER: Hold this card. Play it to cancel any one Action or Drama card before it resolves. The skies open up and wash the whole thing away.
flavor: Sometimes the baseball gods grant a reprieve.

name: Second Opinion
title: Second Opinion
text: KEEPER: Hold this card. Play it to reduce any injury duration by 1 game. The doc says he's fine. Probably. Get back out there.
flavor: In eternity, the medical staff has seen everything. Twice.

name: Car Accident
title: Car Accident
text: Your (+7 or highest) was involved in an automobile accident and may never walk again. Discard player permanently.
flavor: The road between cities is long. Not everyone makes it.

name: Overheard at the Bar
title: Overheard at the Bar
text: You overhear the opposing manager's pitching plan at a bar. Next game, all your batters get +1 Contact. He really should drink quieter.
flavor: Loose lips sink rotations.

name: Telegram from the Owner
title: Telegram from the Owner
text: A telegram arrives from the owner: 'WIN OR ELSE.' If you lose the next game, you must release your lowest-rated player. If you win, the owner sends a bonus: Draw 1 Free Agent.
flavor: Ownership pressure is eternal. Literally.

name: Mystery Stranger
title: Mystery Stranger
text: A man in a trench coat approaches you at the train station. 'I know a guy. (+6). Good glove. Quiet. No questions.' Sign a (+6) from the available pool. No backstory. No paperwork.
flavor: In eternity, some players just appear. Don't ask where from.

name: Fan Favorite
title: Fan Favorite
text: Win: The crowd starts chanting your (+4)'s name. He gains +1 Contact and +1 Clutch next game from the confidence boost. Lose: The crowd boos. -1 morale.
flavor: The crowd giveth and the crowd taketh away.

name: Wrong Hotel Room
title: Wrong Hotel Room
text: Your (+5) walked into the wrong hotel room and found a poker game with three guys from the other team. He lost $200 and his confidence. -1 Contact next game.
flavor: Never draw to an inside straight with men who play forever.

name: Reggie Jackson Integration
title: Reggie Jackson Integration
text: Reggie Jackson would love to play for your team. He'll join if you discard any white player from before 1950. Mr. October has conditions.
flavor: History has debts. Sometimes they come due on the diamond.

choices.label: Sign Reggie Jackson
choices.effectText: Release a white pre-1950 player. Reggie joins.

name: Lou Brock Speed Gate
title: Lou Brock Speed Gate
text: Lou Brock is available. He'll sign if you already have a player with 2 SPD or higher to run with him. Speed attracts speed.
flavor: Brock doesn't want to be the only one running. He wants a gang.

choices.label: Sign Lou Brock
choices.effectText: Brock joins if SPD condition met.

name: Mark McGwire Bash Brother
title: Mark McGwire Bash Brother
text: Mark McGwire is looking for a new Bash Brother. He'll sign if you have a player with 4 POW or higher. Big Mac needs a big friend.
flavor: The forearms. My God, the forearms.

choices.label: Sign Mark McGwire
choices.effectText: McGwire joins if POW condition met.

name: XP: Contact Surge
title: Contact Surge
text: Your created player has been working on his swing in the cage every night. +1 Contact to your created player permanently.
flavor: A thousand swings in the dark. One swing in the light.

name: XP: Power Development
title: Power Development
text: Your created player started lifting with the veterans. Something clicked. +1 Power permanently.
flavor: The kid's getting stronger. The veterans are getting nervous.

name: Pitcher Rattled
title: Pitcher Rattled
text: The opposing pitcher just walked two in a row and kicked the mound. He's rattled. All your batters get +1 Contact this inning.
flavor: You can see it in his eyes. He's lost the zone.

name: Hitter Locked In
title: Hitter Locked In
text: Your best hitter is seeing the ball like a beach ball today. He gets +2 Contact for the rest of this game. The pitcher wants no part of him.
flavor: When you're locked in, the seams look like highway lanes.

name: Dugout Fight Brewing
title: Dugout Fight Brewing
text: Two of your players are jawing at each other in the dugout. Handle it now: bench one for the rest of the game and gain +1 team morale, or let it fester and risk -2 morale after the game.
flavor: The camera pans to the dugout. Somebody's pointing fingers.

choices.label: Bench the instigator
choices.effectText: Lose a player this game. +1 morale.

choices.label: Let them figure it out
choices.effectText: Risk: -2 morale after the game (60% chance).

name: Manager Argument
title: Manager Argument
text: Your manager storms out to argue a call. 50% chance the call is overturned in your favor. 25% chance the manager gets ejected and you lose tactical bonuses for the rest of the game.
flavor: Dirt on the umpire's shoes. Spit on the manager's lips.

name: Crowd Energy
title: Crowd Energy
text: The crowd is on its feet. The noise is deafening. All your players gain +1 Clutch for the remainder of this game. Feed off it.
flavor: Thirty thousand ghosts screaming for one more run.

name: Umpire's Tight Zone
title: Umpire's Tight Zone
text: The umpire is calling a tiny zone tonight. Pitchers lose -1 Control. Batters gain +1 Contact. It's a hitter's night.
flavor: If it ain't down the middle, it ain't a strike.

name: Umpire's Big Zone
title: Umpire's Big Zone
text: The umpire is calling everything tonight. Pitchers gain +1 Control. Batters lose -1 Contact. It's a pitcher's night. Get used to the backward K.
flavor: That was six inches off the plate. Strike three.

name: Wind Blowing Out
title: Wind Blowing Out
text: The wind is blowing straight out to center. All batters gain +1 Power this game. Fly balls become souvenirs.
flavor: The flags are pointing at the scoreboard. The pitchers are pointing at the sky.

name: Wind Blowing In
title: Wind Blowing In
text: The wind is howling in from center. All batters lose -1 Power this game. Bombs become warning-track flyouts.
flavor: The flags are pointing at the pitcher. Good luck, sluggers.

name: Risky Steal Signal
title: Risky Steal Signal
text: Your fastest runner is on first. The catcher has a weak arm. Do you send him? Success: runner advances to third. Failure: caught stealing, rally killed.
flavor: Green light. Red consequences.

name: Hit and Run
title: Hit and Run
text: Runner on first, contact hitter at the plate. Call the hit and run? Success: ball hit through the hole, runners on corners. Failure: liner right at the shortstop, double play.
flavor: The oldest trick in the book. Still works. Sometimes.

choices.label: Call the hit and run
choices.effectText: 55% success: runners on corners. 45% double play.

name: Bench Coach Tip
title: Bench Coach Tip
text: Your bench coach notices the opposing pitcher is tipping his curveball. All batters get +1 Contact for the next 3 at-bats until the pitcher adjusts.
flavor: The hand in the glove tells the whole story.

name: Old Feud Rekindled
title: Old Feud Rekindled
text: Two players from different eras recognize each other from a past life grievance. Your (+6) and their (+6) both get +1 Power this game from pure rage. Baseball is personal.
flavor: Eternity doesn't heal all wounds. Some just ferment.

name: Catcher Framing
title: Catcher Framing
text: Your catcher is framing pitches beautifully tonight. Your pitcher gains +1 Control this game. Every borderline pitch is a strike.
flavor: The best catchers are magicians. The umpire never sees the trick.

name: Pitcher Losing Command
title: Pitcher Losing Command
text: Your starter is losing command. -1 Control. Do you pull him now or let him work through it? Pull: bullpen takes over. Stay: 40% chance he finds it, 60% it gets worse (-1 more).
flavor: The ball is going everywhere except where he wants it.

name: Nerves in the Big Moment
title: Nerves in the Big Moment
text: Bases loaded, two outs. Your batter's hands are shaking. -2 Clutch for this at-bat. Unless he has the 'clutch performer' trait — then +1 Clutch instead. Pressure reveals character.
flavor: Some men rise. Some men freeze. You drafted them. You find out now.

name: Rain Delay
title: Rain Delay
text: Rain delay! The game pauses for 45 minutes. Pitchers cool down. When play resumes, both starters lose -1 Stamina. But the break lets your manager think — choose one batter to gain +1 Contact.
flavor: The tarp comes out. The strategy comes in.

choices.label: Pick a batter to boost
choices.effectText: One batter gains +1 Contact rest of game. Both pitchers -1 Stamina.

name: Bunt for Hit
title: Bunt for Hit
text: Your speedster drops a perfect bunt. If SPD >= 2, it's an automatic infield hit. If SPD < 2, it's a sacrifice. Either way, it rattles the infield.
flavor: The bat goes dead. The legs go live.

name: Star Player Distraction
title: Star Player Distraction
text: Your star player is distracted — he keeps looking into the stands. Someone from his past is in the crowd. -1 to all his stats this game. Unless you bench him: he gets angry and comes back +2 next game.
flavor: Some ghosts sit in the bleachers.

choices.label: Leave him in
choices.effectText: Star player -1 all stats this game.

choices.label: Pull him out
choices.effectText: Lose him this game. +2 all stats next game from anger.

name: Manager Ejection Risk
title: Manager Ejection Risk
text: The umpire warns your manager after a tirade. One more outburst and he's gone. If ejected: lose all manager bonuses this game. If he stays calm: +1 team morale for showing restraint.
flavor: The vein in his neck is throbbing. The ump's thumb is twitching.

choices.label: Let him keep going
choices.effectText: 60% ejection. 40% ump backs down and team gets +2 morale.

name: Perfect Game Bid
title: Perfect Game Bid
text: Your pitcher is perfect through 6 innings. The dugout is silent. Nobody talks to him. +2 Control, +1 Stuff for the rest of the game. But if he allows a hit, the crash is -2 Control from heartbreak.
flavor: Twenty-seven up. Twenty-seven down. Maybe.

name: Bench Jockeying
title: Bench Jockeying
text: Your dugout is riding the opposing batter mercilessly. 50% chance he gets rattled (-1 Contact this at-bat). 50% chance he gets angry (+1 Power this at-bat). Talk shit, get hit.
flavor: Words are weapons. Sometimes they backfire.

name: Pitcher-Catcher Disconnect
title: Pitcher-Catcher Disconnect
text: Your pitcher keeps shaking off the catcher. They're not on the same page. -1 Control until you either call a mound visit (costs 1 bullpen arm warmup) or let them figure it out (50/50 they sync up).
flavor: One finger. Two fingers. Head shake. Repeat.

choices.label: Send someone out
choices.effectText: Costs 1 bullpen arm warmup. Pitcher and catcher sync. Restored.

name: Fog Rolling In
title: Fog Rolling In
text: A thick fog is rolling in from the river. All outfielders -1 Defense. All fly balls have a 15% chance of being 'lost in the fog' for extra bases. It's eerie out there.
flavor: The center fielder disappears into the mist. The ball disappears with him.

name: Walk-Off Moment
title: Walk-Off Moment
text: Bottom of the last inning. Tied game. Your highest-CLU player steps up. He gets +3 Clutch for this at-bat. If he's got the 'legend' tag, it's a guaranteed walk-off hit. This is what eternity is for.
flavor: The stadium holds its breath. The dead hold their breath. Everyone holds their breath.
